programme.title: Masters of the Sky
programme.desc: The masters of the sky are the winged predators of the aerial world. They have evolved as master predators.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: The Arctic is alive with a fascinating assortment of wildlife species, hardy breeds uniquely suited to cold.

programme.title: Survival of the Fittest
programme.desc: Learn how the crocodile, shark, and whale evolved over millions of years to become modern masters of survival.

programme.title: The Big Cats
programme.desc: No one runs the Race of Life faster than the big cats, winners in the contest for survival in the wild.

programme.title: The Great Desert Race
programme.desc: Learn the ways animals have adapted to survive (and thrive!) in the harsh climates of the world's deserts.

programme.title: Herbivores
programme.desc: Somehow, some of the world's largest creatures prosper on the African Savannah with a strict vegetarian diet.

programme.title: Natural Warriors
programme.desc: Explore how animals win the Race of Life from the point of view of food, territory, social status, and mates.

programme.title: Run Like the Wind
programme.desc: Nothing beats speed when it comes to survival in the wild. Learn how some animals are literally born to run.

programme.title: The Sun
programme.desc: We study the sun closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists peer more closely at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets.

programme.title: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: Most of what we see is actually dark matter and dark energy, but its nature eludes us... for the moment.

programme.title: The Story of Energy
programme.desc: Jim investigates a strange set of laws that link together everything from engines to humans to stars.

programme.title: L'Estraneo
programme.desc: Cristian falls in love with Greta, a girl speaking with Spanish accent, a little bit younger than him, who spreads a light and enthusiasm quite different from Cristian's. He lives his love affairs, but, as often happens, “love is not enough”, and soon Christian himself calls into question his whole life and people belonging to it, in order to find serenity.

programme.title: Litorai
programme.desc: A short documentary that tells the story of a town, a marriage and a way of understanding life that only remains in memories.

programme.title: Keepsake
programme.desc: Janine is a young woman on the road to a new life when a freak accident strands her on a deserted highway and a call for help soon becomes a fight for survival. Stalked and tormented by a psychotic tow truck driver, Janine soon finds herself trapped in a world of torture and depravity, imprisoned in a cellar and given only thirty days to live! Janine must contend with both the ghosts of her past and the demons of her present in an effort to survive.

programme.title: Range War
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) comes to the rescue of the railroad when a land baron and his gang try to prevent its construction.

programme.title: A Bucket Of Blood
programme.desc: A dim-witted busboy finds acclaim as an artist for a plaster-covered dead cat that is mistaken as a skillful statuette. The desire for more praise soon leads to an increasingly deadly series of works.

programme.title: Omsch
programme.desc: A travelling artist, painter and filmmaker has a centenarian neighbour. The relationship between this man in his forties and the solitary old lady with a wicked sense of humour gradually becomes a kind of elective kinship. Their discussions, interrupted and picked up again over the years, form the fabric of this personal, tender and surprising film. A calm observation on the inescapable power of the passage of time.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Stories By Rabindranath Tagore
programme.desc: The Characters Of Tagore'S Stories Spring Into Life Through The Cinematic Imagination Of Acclaimed Filmmaker, Anurag Basu In ‘Stories By Rabindranath Tagore'.Tagore'S Words And Basu'S Vision Have Amalgamated Into A Show That Transports You Back In Time To A World As Complicated As This One But With Far More Appeal And Beauty.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Maa Shakti

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Mr Blue Wind
programme.desc: Savannah Zwi is a musician, actress, and artist.Through an innovative, educational experience, the productions expose children to the English language in an enchanting and inventive way. They encourage good moral values, creativity and using your imagination!Beautifully crafted sceneries transport the audience to magical realities and create fantastical memories! Stories are acted out in exquisite costumes with puppets and props which come to life before your eyes and encourage the viewer to use their imagination!

programme.title: Making World Map Felt
programme.desc: Savannah Zwi is a musician, actress, and artist.Through an innovative, educational experience, the productions expose children to the English language in an enchanting and inventive way. They encourage good moral values, creativity and using your imagination!Beautifully crafted sceneries transport the audience to magical realities and create fantastical memories! Stories are acted out in exquisite costumes with puppets and props which come to life before your eyes and encourage the viewer to use their imagination!The productions feature original handmade sets, captivating vocal performances of original music as well as loved Disney and musical theatre classics, cheeky puppet shows, and inventive storytelling. The Savannah Kids experience enlightens both the spirit and the soul, aiming to bond and delight families entrancing and entertaining, inspiring young minds.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: Saskatchewan's bitter cold and unforgiving wind makes for brutal days and nights for Chris and Casey. A rainstorm adds more difficulty and discomfort. Mentally drained and hungry, the brothers must try new tactics to find food and warmth.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: The lack of hunting opportunities have drained Chris and Casey's patience. Arguments ensue when they disagree over staying put, or portaging to a new lake. Signs of a bear remind the brothers that they must remain focused in order to stay alive.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: Symptoms of starvation have set in for Chris and Casey, who haven't eaten in days. When they cross paths with a grouse, the unexpected happens. Frustration peaks as the temperatures drop. The brothers set up a new camp, but will it help the hunt?

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: With still no big game in sight, Chris and Casey are forced to rely on fishing for food. The cold temperatures have slowed down the fish, creating challenges. When Mother Nature brings a brutal snow storm, the brothers are tested like never before.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: After weeks of trying to survive in Saskatchewan, Chris and Casey have yet to kill big game. Time is running out as the bear begin to hibernate. Mental willpower is wearing thin. But a message from back home changes everything.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: A turn of events lifts the brothers' spirits, but creates a huge hurdle they must overcome as they enter a new race against the clock. Chris and Casey reflect on the challenges they have faced so far, and the challenges that still lie ahead.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: In the exciting season finale, Chris lays it all on the line one last time while bear hunting. Casey must finish one final task to make the fruits of their labor worthwhile. As the brothers inch closer to safety, they wonder what the future holds.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Sanrachna
programme.desc: Shelter - one of mankind's most basic physiological needs. At least that's what it started out as at the beginning of time. From dwelling in caves to carving out temples in mountains, mankind has redefined shelter with every passing era. Though the underlying philosophy of any monument is to serve some sort of function, great architecture is fuelled by imagination. India's architecture is built on that very imagination and is a fascinating fusion of both art and science. From strategically placed astronomy towers to impressive and awe-inspiring tombs, Indian architecture has pushed the limits of engineering and design. Sanrachna explores these architectural wonders and how the makers of these marvels made them without the aid of modern mechanics and machinery. With an immensely astute sense of engineering, the architects were able to construct fortresses that have stood the test of time, unshaken by its changes. Join our host Vaibhavi as she travels through the country discovering the fascinating stories behind India's outstanding monuments and its architecture. Sanrachna will leave you in awe of the past and its ability to do what we can't, even with our modern tools and fancy tricks.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Delving into the cold mountainous region of Valle D'Aosta, Celebrity chef Michael Bonacini whips up a meal of four hearty dishes that are sure to warm up any chilly day. First up is Michael's antipasto of Wild Mushrooms and Lardo on Rye. Coated with rich, earthy mushrooms, buttery fontina cheese, and savoury cured pork, this decadent dish highlights a combination of iconic flavours from Valle D'Aosta. Next up is a twist on traditional pasta with Valle D'Aosta's unique Chestnut Fettucine topped with Sweet Pork and Earthy Cabbage. The secret to this dish? Chestnut flour to create a denser, sweeter, and nuttier pasta. For his secondo, Michael turns to the pride of the region, Fontina cheese, to fill his Stuffed Veal Cutlets. Luscious and rich, this dish is a burst of luxurious flavours in every bite. For his final dish, Michael shows his sweet side with a Crema di Cogne served with Valdostana Tile Cookies. The thin, crispy cookies with a hint of hazelnut dipped in a light chocolate cream are the perfect way to wrap up Michael's luxurious Valle D'Aosta meal.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever

programme.title: Novi Sad Synagogue, Serbia
programme.desc: Right in the city center of Novi Sad, Serbia, this crucial area, on Jevrejska Street – literally, Jewish Street - the synagogue of Novi Sad occupies a prominent spot both geographically as well as in the historical annals of the city.

programme.title: Mar Elias Monastery
programme.desc: Mar Elias monastery lies on the side of the road from Jerusalem and Bethlehem. It is maintained by the Greek-Orthodox church, and by local tradition Elijah rested here while fleeing from Queen Jezebel

programme.title: City of Venice, Italy (Part 2)
programme.desc: Celebrated throughout the world for its singular beauty, discover Venice and some of its famous places. An open-air museum that seems to float on its lagoon, and a World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. It retains the ancient cultural values and still maintains its traditional style while rejecting the technology that has changed everything.

programme.title: Sifnos, Cyclades island, Greece
programme.desc: An elegant island, symbolic of the Cyclades, discover the Greek island of Sifnos, full of contrasts, where the most arid mountains rub shoulders with the greenest valleys, and where monasteries dominate sandy beaches.

programme.title: Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris. These ancient city walls are some of the best-preserved in the country.

programme.title: Tallinn town, Estonia
programme.desc: Entering now in the Old Town of Tallinn, we understand how it became the best-preserved medieval city in Northern Europe, boasting Gothic spires, winding cobblestone streets, and enchanting architecture.Tallinn, the capital of Estonia, is a city out of a fairytale with centuries of history and traditions.

programme.title: Church of Nativity, Israel
programme.desc: The Church of The Nativity is situated in Betlehem to the south of Jerusalem.In 327 the church of Nativity was commissioned by Constantine the Great and his mother Helena over the site that was traditionally considered to be located over the cave that mar"&"ks the birthplace of Jesus…

programme.title: Temple of Sri Kailawasanathan Swami Devasthanam, Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Temple of Sri Kailawasanathan Swami Devasthanam Kovil is located in Colombo. The temple of Sri Kailawasanathan Swami DevasthanamKovil is one of the most beautiful and lovely attraction places of Sri Lanka. There are many beautiful and elegant paintings of God and Goddesss. Also there are an beautiful carvings of an astrology chart.

programme.title: Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, Italy
programme.desc: Hidden in the hills of Italy lies Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, the Ducal Palace of Urbino. It may seem strange to find such grand Renaissance architecture outside of the great cities. We all know about Rome, Venice, Florence and their great works. But the Ducal Palace of Urbino is often forgotten, despite rivaling all of them with its splendor and great history.

programme.title: Mir Castle Complex, Belarus
programme.desc: Located in the small town center, Mir Castle's complex is one of the earliest monuments to exist to this day and the most essential. This centuries-old Castle, reflected magnificently in an adjoining pond, resembles a building straight out of fairy tales. The common name 'mir' shared by the Castle and the town literally translates to 'peace' this justifies the fact that the Castle's sole purpose was built to bring harmony and peace to the region, followed by the signing of several peace treaties.

programme.title: Sassi di Matera, Italy
programme.desc: Between the toe and heel of Southern Italy, there is the Basilicata region. This mountainous and arid landscape of the area has ensured a relatively sparse population and only in recent years has local infrastructure been developed. One of the larger popu"&"lation centers in this remote area is the unique and spectacular City of Sassi di Matera. Matera is internationally famed for its Sassi areas which have initially been prehistoric troglodyte settlements. The cavernous habitations were painstakingly dug ou"&"t of the soft calcareous rock, which is a characteristic of this part of Southern Italy.

programme.title: HOTELS in Maldives Part 3
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction the Maldives (Part 3)

programme.title: Atzara Old Town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: Atzara is a comune in the Province of Nuoro in the Italian region Sardinia, located about 90 kilometres north of Cagliari and about 45 kilometres southwest of Nuoro. Located in Barbagia, the original village date back to the years around 1000 and develope"&"d near the spring of Bingia de giosso, still existing.

programme.title: Arnad town, Aosta Valley, Italy
programme.desc: Arnad town in Aosta Valley is known for the production of the D.O.C Montjovet wine. The small medieval village stands on the banks of the Dora Baltea. It is situated on the banks of the Dora Baltea. Arnad has its roots in tradition: from rock climbing a"&"mong the most famous Alps to the walks in the woods of chestnut or between churches and castles, testimonies of a great past. Nature, sport, history, genuine flavors, relaxation.

programme.title: In Alberobello Trulli, Italy
programme.desc: Alberobello is a village in Puglia where ancient traditions still characterize an entire community to this day. Perhaps the masterpiece of Puglia is Alberobello itself. No tourist manual ignores it. Every geography book for middle schools carries a photog"&"raph of its Trulli. Alberobello is a perfect village whose formula has become a style in the rigor with which it has been applied.

programme.title: Tabatabaei Natanzi Historical House, Iran
programme.desc: The ancient city of Kashan is located in the northern part of the Isfahan province in Iran. Throughout Persian history, Kashan has always been the core of ceramics, lustreware, knitting, and weaving, producing decorated pottery, glazed tiles, and finest w"&"ool and silk carpets. This is one of them, built by Seyed Jafar Tabatabaee, during the Qajar dynasty: The Tabatabaei Historical House...

programme.title: Herodion National Park, Israel
programme.desc: Herodion, one of Herod the Great's most ambitious building projects, served the Judean King as summer palace, fortress, monument, burial ground and district capital. Of all the sites built by the ""builder-king"", Herodion is the only one that bears his n"&"ame.The immense Herodion complex, fifteen kilometers south of Jerusalem and about five kilometers south-east of Bethlehem, near the ancient roads to the dead Sea, was built between 23 and 20 B.C.E. It was divided into two sections: Upper Herodion, which c"&"ontained the palace set within a circular fortress on an artificial cone-shaped mountain and Lower Herodion, at the base of the mountain, which consisted of numerous palace annexes for use by the king's family and friends, and for the central offices of "&"the district capital.

programme.title: Banias Spring, Israel
programme.desc: Located at the foot of Mount Hermon, north of the Golan Heights, we can find a spring. This spring is the Banias River source, one of the main tributaries of the Jordan River. Here, archaeologists uncovered a shrine dedicated to Pan and related deities. L"&"et find out about the remains of an ancient city founded sometime after Alexander the Great's conquest.
